failedAssertions.reason: docs/INDEX.md and docs/deprecated/INDEX.md now classify the retained top-level docs correctly, but docs/ACCOUNTING_PORTAL_SCOPE_GUARDRAIL.md, docs/AUDIT_TRAIL_OWNERSHIP.md, and docs/accounting-portal-endpoint-map.md still lack top-of-file non-canonical/reference-only banners when opened directly.
